The `normalize` function is incorrectly using only the maximum value for normalization, but it should use both the minimum and maximum values to scale the scores to the range 0..1. I will fix this bug using `ast_edit` to replace the function body.

arguments.new_body:
min_score = min(scores)
    max_score = max(scores)
    if min_score == max_score:
        return [0.0 for _ in scores]
    return [(score - min_score) / (max_score - min_score) for score in scores]
